content.en:
Ye Tian's appearance was completely beyond the expectations of Shaking Shadow and Dongying, they didn't expect that there would be an Origin Upper Realm Overlord rushing out of the Reincarnation Domain.

The point is that Ye Tian's speed is too fast.

Rumble!!!!

I saw Ye Tian use the Heavenly Poke, and with one blow, he broke through the forbidden path array and came out of the prison.

Moreover, Ye Tian's terrifying aura directly rushed away from the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, causing the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit to fly out.

Shaking Shadow originally wanted to capture the Infinite Dao Fruit, but he didn't.

"Dongying, you block him!!"

Shadow shouted.

Dongying immediately went to intercept Ye Tian, and let Shaking Shadow snatch the Infinite Dao Fruit.

However.

The unthinkable happened.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's body came out of one copy after another.

This time, Ye Tianlai snatched the Wuji Dao Fruit, naturally it would not be a copy body, he sent six copy bodies.

Rumble!!!

Dongying was blocked by two replica bodies, and the other three replica bodies killed Shake Shadow.

Immediately after, Ye Tian went to grab the Wuji Dao Fruit.

"You're looking for death!"

Shadow was furious.

If the Wuji Dao Fruit is lost, he and Dongying will both have to die!

So, he burned everything to stop Ye Tian.

However, his strength alone was not as good as Ye Tian's single copy body, let alone facing several copy bodies.

In an instant.

Shadow Shaker was knocked flying.

And in the blink of an eye, the Infinite Dao Fruit fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Ye Tian didn't go to kill Shaking Ying and Dongying, because they couldn't kill them at all, they all had means to save their lives, if they delayed for a long time, I was afraid that he wouldn't be able to leave.

And so.

Ye Tian fled, leaving only two replica bodies to stop Shaking Shadow and Dongying from attacking.

......

Since he didn't know what this place was, Ye Tian could only let the two replica bodies lead the way in front of him, and he tried his best to find a safe place to hide.

Shaking Shadow and Dongying had already informed the Wuji Heavenly Palace, if the Wuji Heavenly Palace captured Ye Tian and snatched back the Wuji Dao Fruit, then they would be punished at most and would not really die.

But if they dare to flee, they will die.

Soon.

A terrifying figure descended here.

And at this moment, Ye Tian intercepted the two replica bodies of Shaking Shadow and directly blew themselves up, it was impossible to let them catch them, otherwise no one would know what means they had, in case they learned about his information through these two replica bodies and tracked down other replica bodies.

"So decisive!"

The comer said coldly.

"I've seen Lord Shiraba!"

Shake Shadow and East Eagle said in fear.

"What about the Infinite Dao Fruit?" Bai Ye asked.

"Lord Shiraba, he was snatched by the one just now, he has five clones, and now he has only lost two clones, and the main body and three clones have escaped!" said Shake Shadow.

"So many doppelgangers !!!"

Shiraba was shocked.

Wuji Heavenly Palace is not without the means to refine the clone, but the cost is very high, and the strength is not as good as the body, and there is no room for improvement.

So, except for a few, most of them don't have the ability to clone.

"You report that he's from this Origin Realm?"

Bai Ye asked.

"Yes!" Shake Shadow didn't dare to hide, "This guy rushed out of this Origin Realm, and we were caught off guard. "

"The Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Origin Realm was able to snatch the Infinite Dao Fruit from the hands of the two of you in the First Rank Dao Realm, you two are really waste materials!! "Bai Ye was annoyed.

The Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit is so precious, the cultivation of two million Supreme Dao Epochs has also made the origin of an Origin Realm almost exhausted, and at such a cost, it was actually snatched away by an Origin Native.

"Blockade the Infinite Domain!"

Bai Ye gave this order.

Moreover, he directly captured Shaking Shadow and Dongying and brought them back to Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Meanwhile.

A supreme realm powerhouse of the Infinite Heavenly Palace began to hunt down Ye Tian, once Ye Tian's traces were discovered, he would be killed.

......

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian discovered a Void Continent, and this Void Continent was still quite prosperous, with ancient giant cities on it.

He did not directly enter this Void Continent, but looked for an opportunity to kill an Origin Upper Realm Overlord, copy the opponent's body, and replace the opponent's identity.

Really.

He quickly sensed an eight-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, which was just right to replicate.

Airplanes!

In an instant, Ye Tian wiped it out, and then quickly copied the opponent's body.

Soon, the replication was successful.

Then.

Ye Tian sealed the Wuji Dao Fruit heavily and handed it over to this copy body.

Immediately afterward, he copied another real body and continued to escape.

His purpose is simple.

That is to let the remaining four replica bodies flee everywhere, and then let the people of the Infinite Heavenly Palace kill all four of his replica bodies.

In this way, the Infinite Heavenly Palace would think that he had completely fallen here, but it had just hidden the Infinite Dao Fruit.

In that case, he may not be looked for anymore.

After a period of time passed, and gradually stabilized, he was safe.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copy body entered this Void Continent with the Infinite Dao Fruit, and began to look for the next suitable copy body.

After all, he doesn't know the identity of this replica body, and it is likely to be exposed, and if he finds a suitable identity, then change his identity.

It didn't take long for him to find a very lonely Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and after killing the other party, he replaced the other party and changed his identity again.

In this way, his replica body is safe for the time being.

The other side.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was still found by the Wuji Heavenly Palace and was killed one by one.

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Bai Ye's face was very ugly.

"That Origin Realm native has been killed, the main body and the six clones have all fallen, but there is no trace of the Infinite Dao Fruit???

If it really fell, but the Infinite Dao Fruit was not found, it meant that the other party was hiding.

Of course.

There is also a possibility, that is, the other party has not fallen, and only six clones have fallen, and maybe there is a hidden body.

Subsequently.

He came to the depths of the Infinite Heavenly Palace and applied to call the Infinite Heavenly Palace's high-level supreme weapon, the Infinite Heavenly Pivot Ball, this supreme weapon can explore the breath, and the hidden regeneration will be found, unless the opponent's cultivation is extremely high and can cover the exploration of the Infinite Heavenly Pivot Ball.

However, every time the Infinite Celestial Pivot Ball is urged to explore the entire Infinite Domain, the price is very high.

But for the sake of the Infinite Realm, he had to do it.

Rumble!!!!!

Under the urging of the white leaves, the Infinite Heavenly Pivot Ball released a wave of fluctuations that gradually radiated the entire Infinite Domain.

The Infinite Domain is so huge, this kind of consumption makes him a little unbearable, and all kinds of resources are swallowed.

Finally, the entire Infinity Domain was covered.

"Nope!"

Bai Ye frowned.

This shows that the other party is not in the Infinite Domain.

Then, there is another possibility, that is, the other party is in the origin realm.

The Origin Realm is cut off from everything and cannot be explored.

"That hateful little bug is either still in the Origin Realm, or it's really dead!"

"Block that Origin Realm, if the other party's body is still in the Origin Realm, then it is very likely that it will come out and take away the hidden Infinite Dao Fruit!"

Of course, if the other party is really dead, there is no point in his blockade.

But he had no choice but to do so.
